request.prompt: Action: focused idle checking the staff signal, gently tilting the staff and glancing at the staff orb, tiny robe and hair motion. Use the reference as the exact character identity. Create one clean horizontal 8-frame pixel-art sprite strip. Same Frieren-like silver-haired elf mage, same official white-gold outfit, same ordinary staff. IMPORTANT layout: eight separate full-body characters, smaller scale, each frame fully inside its invisible slot, at least 20% empty magenta margin around every character, no body, hair, staff, or boot touching a slot edge or image edge. Same scale, same foot baseline, same camera. Pure magenta #FF00FF chroma-key background across the whole image. No shadow, no glow, no floor, no text, no border, no grid, no scene. Do not use magenta, pink, purple-pink, or colors close to #FF00FF in character, props, highlights, shadows, or effects.
